job_summary: A Cardiology CRA monitors trials related to cardiovascular diseases, including drug and device studies.
key_responsibilities: Monitor trials involving heart diseases (e.g., hypertension, heart failure)
Review ECGs, imaging data, and cardiovascular endpoints
Ensure compliance with trial protocols and safety standards
Coordinate with cardiologists and site staff
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Nursing
career_path: Cardiology CRA → Senior CRA → Clinical Trial Manager
skills_required: coordinate with cardiologists and site staff
ensure compliance with trial protocols and safety standards
monitor trials involving heart diseases (e.g., hypertension, heart failure)
review ecgs, imaging data, and cardiovascular endpoints
